# Riido Work Branch Gate

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/branchgate -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`riido-work-branch-gate.riido.json`](riido-work-branch-gate.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `branch-gate-evidence`.

Shape: `<PROJECT_KEY>-<NUMBER>-<SLUG>`

Pattern: `^[A-Z][A-Z0-9]*-[0-9]+-.+$`

## Rules

- Every code or documentation change must use the branchName returned by Riido task creation.
- Namespaced helper branches such as codex/... or feature/... are rejected.
- Whitespace in branch names is rejected.
- The format gate proves Riido work-unit shape; the exact branchName source remains the Riido task response.

## Examples

| Branch | Accepted | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `main` | `true` | default branch is allowed for local checks |
| `A-40-AI-Agent-SSOT-Riido-작업-branchName-사용-강제` | `true` | Riido work-unit branch shape |
| `RIID-4892-public-provider-smoke-harness` | `true` | Riido work-unit branch shape |
| `codex/not-allowed` | `false` | namespaced helper branch |
| `feature-branch` | `false` | missing Riido task key |
| `RIID 4892 bad whitespace` | `false` | whitespace |

## Assertions

- `branch gate script is generated from this manifest`
- `reader doc is generated from this manifest`
- `accepted and rejected branch examples are executed as verification evidence`
- `PR branch-name workflow calls the generated script`

Executable gate: `scripts/verify-riido-work-branch.sh`.

PR workflow: `.github/workflows/riido-work-branch.yml`.
